<!--
Title format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>
e.g.  feat(dns): add DoH probe for nameservers
      fix(ssrf): block IPv4-mapped loopback addresses
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what changes, why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature (minor bump)
- [ ] fix — bug fix (patch bump)
- [ ] perf / refactor / docs — patch bump
- [ ] test / chore / ci / build — no release
- [ ] BREAKING CHANGE in body — major bump

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm run ci` is green
- [ ] Added / updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Manually verified the change in `npm run dev`
- [ ] (if UI) checked light + dark theme, TR + EN

## Screenshots / logs

<!-- Drop screenshots, terminal output or curl examples here. -->

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything subtle, risky, or non-obvious. -->
